title: UTCDate: parse vs as_str guidance missing
description: UTCDate has parse() and as_str() but neither doc says when to prefer one over the other. parse() is for date arithmetic (returns chrono DateTime); as_str() is for passing the wire string back to JSON. Also: type doc says 'Guaranteed non-empty' but from_trusted accepts arbitrary strings, so parse() can fail even on a non-empty UTCDate — this 'non-empty \!= valid RFC 3339' invariant is undocumented.
